title: Copy Automations across existing Boards
excerpt: As a user, I want the ability to copy automations across existing boards so that I do not have to manually add them to each board in my organization, saving time and streamlining workflows.

posts.author: J.Neris (Jason Neris)
posts.cookedHtml: As a user, I want the ability to copy automations across existing boards so that I do not have to manually add them to each board in my organization, saving time and streamlining workflows.

posts.author: Mindflows_MK (MK Escabarte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jason, MK here from Mindflows Totally agree — that would be a huge time-saver. Right now, Monday doesn’t support copying automations directly between existing boards, but one workaround is to create a template board with all your automations set up. Then you can duplicate that board whenever needed, and the automations come along with it.

For existing boards, you’d still need to recreate them manually or use a tool like Make to help standardize workflows across multiple boards.
